note: Every site where the 1974 source delegates rules to an external product. This registry is the dependency surface the retroclone must replace with original mechanics — and the scope-seed for the openfwg1972 adapter (CHAINMAIL 2nd ed.). OUTDOOR SURVIVAL (Avalon Hill board-as-map) will likely be replaced, not adapted; Fight in the Skies is name-checked only.

CHAINMAIL.role: upstream rules core: melee/missile resolution, man-to-man and mass combat, morale, jousting, fantasy-creature abilities

OUTDOOR SURVIVAL.role: wilderness playing board: terrain, movement penalties, lost-party direction rules

Fight in the Skies.role: credited inspiration for the BITS aerial system; no rules delegated
